videos.description: Iowa's Tyler Goodson pulls off one of the most impressive 4-yard runs you'll see as he goes up and over Indiana's Tiawan Mullen.

videos.headline: Riley Moss runs back 30-yard pick-six for Iowa

videos.headline: Spencer Petras runs it in himself to extend Iowa's lead
